tasks.title: POST /v1/reputation/batch — batch agent reputation lookup
tasks.description: New endpoint: POST /v1/reputation/batch accepts { agentIds: string[] } (max 50). Returns array of { agentId, score, tier } for each found agent. Missing agents are omitted (no 404). Validation: agentIds must be an array, max 50 items. Tests: 200-found-multiple, 200-empty-when-none, 400-missing-agentIds, 400-exceeds-50, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/reputation.ts (add route) + backend/src/routes/__tests__/reputation-batch.test.ts
tasks._blockedReason: Mass block 2026-03-25: zombie tasks from old sprint running destructively via sprint runner. Review before unblocking.

tasks.title: GET /v1/tax/rates — list supported country tax rates
tasks.description: New read endpoint returning all supported tax rates by country. Response: { countries: [{ code, name, vatRate, type: 'EU_VAT'|'US_NEXUS'|'OTHER' }] }. No DB call — pure in-memory lookup from the EU_VAT_RATES and US_NEXUS_RATES constants already in tax service. Tests: 200 returns array, has EU countries, has US states, response shape. File: backend/src/routes/tax.ts (add GET /v1/tax/rates) + tests.
tasks._blockedReason: Mass block 2026-03-25: zombie tasks from old sprint running destructively via sprint runner. Review before unblocking.

tasks.title: GET /v1/invoices/search?q= — search invoices by customer
tasks.description: Add GET /v1/invoices/search?q= endpoint. Searches customerEmail and customerName fields (case-insensitive ILIKE). Returns up to 20 matching invoices with standard invoice shape. Validation: q must be at least 2 chars. Tests: 200-matches-email, 200-matches-name, 400-short-query, 200-empty-when-no-match, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts (add GET /v1/invoices/search) + tests.
tasks._blockedReason: Mass block 2026-03-25: zombie tasks from old sprint running destructively via sprint runner. Review before unblocking.

tasks.title: GET /v1/settlements/stats — settlement volume statistics
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/settlements/stats. Returns: { total: number, totalValue: number, byNetwork: Record<string, { count, value }>, avgSettlementTimeMs: number | null }. Reads from Invoice table where status IN (SETTLED, COMPLETED). Tests: 200-with-data, 200-empty, byNetwork-groups, avgSettlementTime-null-without-timestamps, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/settlement-summary.ts (add route) or new file + app.ts registration.

tasks.title: GET /v1/metrics with from/to time-range filtering
tasks.description: Extend GET /v1/metrics to accept optional ?from= and ?to= ISO date query params. Filters invoice and settlement counts to the given period. Tests: 200-with-from, 200-with-to, 200-with-both, 200-without-params-still-works, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/metrics.ts (modify existing route) + new test file.
